scores.notes: Uses legacy install+config_changed event pattern with direct self.unit.status assignment rather than the modern CollectStatusEvent pattern. Both approaches work but the gold standard prefers collect_unit_status. The description confirms containers/resources for K8s and config option declared in charmcraft.yaml. All APIs referenced (WaitingStatus, ActiveStatus, install event, config_changed event) are real. Deducted one point on idiomatic for not using CollectStatusEvent.
